info.title: Kyros API
info.description: Persistent memory operating system for AI agents

post.description:
Smart Ingestion Gateway: Ingests raw turn into episodic memories,

while automatically extracting and writing bitemporal semantic facts and
causal edges asynchronously in the background.

Smart Retrieval Gateway: Searches across episodic, semantic, and procedural

memories concurrently using query classification, freshness decay, and
local Cross-Encoder reranking.
Store an episodic memory (conversation turn, action, observation).
Retrieve relevant episodic memories via semantic search.

schema.title: Memory Id

put.description: Upsert a semantic fact (subject-predicate-object triple) dynamically.

post.description: Store a semantic fact (subject-predicate-object triple) with contradiction detection.
Query the semantic knowledge graph via natural language.

get.description: Return the agent's semantic belief graph for frontend rendering (D3/Cytoscape).

schema.title: Agent Id
Limit
Response Get Semantic Graph V1 Memory Semantic Graph  Agent Id  Get

post.description: Store a learned procedure (workflow, tool-call sequence).

Find the best matching procedure for a task description.

Results are ranked by: 0.60 × cosine_similarity + 0.40 × success_rate
Report success/failure for a procedure (reinforcement signal).
Search across episodic, semantic, and procedural memory simultaneously.

get.description: Get the compressed history card for an agent.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Summarise V1 Admin Summarise  Agent Id  Get

get.description: Export all memories for an agent as JSON.

schema.title: Agent Id

post.description: Import memories from JSON into an agent.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Import Memories V1 Admin Import  Agent Id  Post

get.description: Get a comprehensive staleness report for an agent.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Staleness Report V1 Admin Staleness Report  Agent Id  Get

get.description: Get the current decay rate configuration.

schema.title: Response Get Decay Rates V1 Admin Decay Rates Get
Response Update Decay Rates V1 Admin Decay Rates Put

get.description: Get the cryptographic Merkle proof for a specific memory.

schema.title: Memory Id
Response Get Memory Proof V1 Admin Memory  Memory Id  Proof Get

post.description: Verify the cryptographic integrity of all memories for an agent.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Audit Integrity V1 Admin Agent  Agent Id  Audit Post

get.description: Export the immutable audit log for an agent for the past N days.

schema.title: Agent Id
Days
Response Compliance Export V1 Admin Agent  Agent Id  Compliance Export Get

post.description: Migrate all agent memory embeddings to a new embedding model space.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Migrate Embeddings V1 Admin Agent  Agent Id  Migrate Embeddings Post

delete.description: GDPR 'Right to be Forgotten' — hard delete all memories for an agent.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Hard Delete Agent Memories V1 Admin Agent  Agent Id  Memories Delete

get.description: List all agents for the current tenant.

schema.title: Response List Agents V1 Admin Agents Get

post.description: Explicitly register/create a new agent (project namespace).

schema.title: Response Create Agent V1 Admin Agents Post

post.description:
Create a new tenant and generate an API key.

Requires the master admin token or jwt_secret_key for authentication.

schema.title: Response Create Tenant V1 Admin Tenants Post

post.description: Create a new tenant with free tier/sandbox plan and return the generated API key.

schema.title: Response Create Public Sandbox Key V1 Admin Public Sandbox Keys Post

get.description: Retrieve the recent background tasks and their execution statuses/errors.

schema.title: Response Get Background Tasks V1 Admin Background Tasks Get

get.description: Retrieve the current in-memory LLM configurations and active status.

schema.title: Response Get Llm Config V1 Admin Configure Llm Get

post.description: Dynamically configure LLM API key in memory and persist to .env.

schema.title: Response Configure Llm V1 Admin Configure Llm Post

post.description: Test if the provided LLM credentials are valid by making a lightweight test call.

schema.title: Response Test Llm V1 Admin Test Llm Post

delete.description: Delete an agent (project namespace) and all its associated memories completely.

schema.title: Agent Id
Response Delete Agent V1 Admin Agents  Agent Id  Delete

post.description:
Generate and rotate a new API key for an existing tenant.

Requires master admin token.

schema.title: Target Tenant Id
Response Rotate Tenant Key V1 Admin Tenants  Target Tenant Id  Rotate Key Post

post.description: Explain why a memory happened (causal chain traversal).

schema.title: Response Explain Memory V1 Memory Causal Explain Post

post.description: Analyze what causes a specific type of event across all memories.

schema.title: Response Frequent Causes V1 Memory Causal Frequent Causes Post

get.description: Return the agent's causal graph for D3/Cytoscape frontend rendering.

schema.title: Agent Id
Limit
Response Get Causal Graph V1 Memory Causal Graph  Agent Id  Get

get.description:
Return the current trust and compliance status of the platform.

Update the compliance fields to reflect your actual certification status
before deploying to production.

schema.title: Response Get Trust Status V1 Trust Status Get

get.description: Serve dashboard with no-cache headers so edits are always visible.
Serve dashboard with no-cache headers so edits are always visible.

Liveness probe — returns OK if the process is running.

schema.title: Response Health Check Health Get

get.description: Readiness probe — checks all dependencies before accepting traffic.

propagated_updates.title: Propagated Updates
propagated_updates.description: Other facts whose confidence was updated due to this fact

include_causal_ancestry.title: Include Causal Ancestry
include_causal_ancestry.description: If true, fetches causal ancestors for each recalled memory

retrieve_by_entity.title: Retrieve By Entity
retrieve_by_entity.description: If true, performs dynamic canonical entity resolution retrieval

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional metadata for search context (e.g. reference_time)

strict.title: Strict
strict.description: Strict deterministic recall mode (bypass vector search and use only canonical fact store)

memory_category.title: Memory Category
memory_category.description: Optional category to determine decay rate

decay_rate_override.title: Decay Rate Override
decay_rate_override.description: Optional hard override for decay rate

cause_memory_id.title: Cause Memory Id
cause_memory_id.description: ID of the memory that caused this one

effect_memory_id.title: Effect Memory Id
effect_memory_id.description: ID of the memory that this one caused

event_time.title: Event Time
event_time.description: Optional absolute or relative temporal information

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Optional creation timestamp (ISO format, Locomo format, or epoch float)

event_time.title: Event Time
event_time.description: Optional absolute or relative temporal information

source_episodic_id.title: Source Episodic Id
source_episodic_id.description: Optional link to original episodic turn

event_time.title: Event Time
event_time.description: Optional absolute or relative temporal information
